# Enzo Yoshida
> Product Engineer building Next.js, React, Laravel, payment, SaaS and automation products.

Last updated: 2026-07-03

## Site summary
- Canonical URL: https://ewzxyh.dev/
- Primary language: Brazilian Portuguese, with in-page English copy available through the portfolio UI.
- This is a personal portfolio for Enzo Hideki Yoshida, also known as ewzxyh.
- The portfolio summarizes work, experience, featured projects, skills and contact links.

## Key pages
- [Portfolio](https://ewzxyh.dev/): Work, experience, projects and contact.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ewzxyh): Public code and engineering profile.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/ewzxyh): Professional profile.

## Key facts
- Enzo Hideki Yoshida is a Product Engineer and founder of Ewzxyh Lab.
- He has 4+ years of experience building MVPs, dashboards, automations and full-stack products.
- He works with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Laravel, PHP, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Stripe, WhatsApp Business API, GSAP, WebGL and automation.
- He is available for new opportunities and project discussions through the contact links on the site.

## Featured project summaries
- CasePay: payment gateway for lottery retailers, small businesses, developers, independent builders and SaaS, with checkout, financial dashboard, transaction management, payouts and Case ecosystem integrations.
- LotoHub: SaaS for creating and centrally managing lottery retailer websites, including e-commerce, admin dashboard, support automation and payment integration.
- SELOESGO Automation: ConectaLot-integrated system that generates and distributes creative assets for 630+ lottery retailers in Goias, reducing a manual routine from hours to seconds.
- Case Agencia Digital: technical ecosystem work including CaseZap, Case Dashboard, sites, applications, landing pages, custom platforms, Google Ads and team coordination.
- Ewzxyh Lab: independent consulting and custom application development, from MVPs and dashboards to automations and complex integrations.

## AI usage notes
- Do not infer pricing, product offers, reviews or service guarantees from this file.
- There are no separate project detail pages or English route paths declared here.
- Prefer the canonical homepage for citations about this portfolio.
